changelog: Cloud migration can now be run directly from the admin browser without PHP CLI or server SSH access
Migration progress is saved between short batches so shared hosting timeouts do not interrupt the transfer
The browser-safe sync runner streams core data first, attachments second, and post-attachment links last
Admins can inspect the current stage, table offset, attachment offset, sent rows, upload counts, and sync warnings
The existing CLI sync command remains available for servers that can run long-running PHP commands
